ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { text: vars.query, customerId: vars.customerId, context: vars.context }

logger.message: Generating natural language response for intent: #[vars.intent.category]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { query: vars.query, intent: vars.intent, responseData: vars.responseData, customerId: vars.customerId }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { response: payload.response, actions: vars.responseData.actions, data: vars.responseData.data, followUpQuestions: payload.followUpQuestions default [ "Would you like to see more details?", "Is there anything else I can help you with?", "Would you like to set up notifications for updates?" ] }

db:insert.doc:name: Insert Service Request
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO service_requests ( request_id, customer_id, request_type, description, priority, contact_preference, created_date, status ) VALUES ( :requestId, :customerId, :requestType, :description, :priority, :contactPreference, SYSDATE, 'SUBMITTED' )
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ requestId: vars.requestId, customerId: payload.customerId, requestType: payload.type, description: payload.description, priority: payload.priority default "NORMAL", contactPreference: payload.contactPreference default "EMAIL" }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { requestId: vars.requestId, message: "Service request created successfully", estimatedResponse: "24 hours", status: "SUBMITTED" }

db:select.doc:name: Get Request Status
db:select.db:sql: SELECT sr.request_id, sr.status, sr.description, sr.created_date, sr.estimated_completion, su.update_date, su.status as update_status, su.notes FROM service_requests sr LEFT JOIN service_updates su ON sr.request_id = su.request_id WHERE sr.request_id = :requestId ORDER BY su.update_date DESC

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { requestId: payload[0].request_id, status: payload[0].status, description: payload[0].description, createdDate: payload[0].created_date as Date, estimatedCompletion: payload[0].estimated_completion as Date, updates: payload filter ($.update_date != null) map { timestamp: $.update_date as DateTime, status: $.update_status, notes: $.notes } }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "Service request not found", "message": "Service request with ID " ++ attributes.uriParams.requestId ++ " not found" }

db:select.doc:name: Get Preferences
db:select.db:sql: SELECT bill_reminders, outage_alerts, usage_alerts, savings_tips, email_enabled, sms_enabled, push_enabled FROM notification_preferences WHERE customer_id = :customerId

db:update.doc:name: Update Preferences
db:update.db:sql: MERGE INTO notification_preferences np USING (SELECT :customerId as customer_id FROM dual) src ON (np.customer_id = src.customer_id) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET bill_reminders = :billReminders, outage_alerts = :outageAlerts, usage_alerts = :usageAlerts, savings_tips = :savingsTips, email_enabled = :emailEnabled, sms_enabled = :smsEnabled, push_enabled = :pushEnabled, updated_date = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (customer_id, bill_reminders, outage_alerts, usage_alerts, savings_tips, email_enabled, sms_enabled, push_enabled, created_date) VALUES (:customerId, :billReminders, :outageAlerts, :usageAlerts, :savingsTips, :emailEnabled, :smsEnabled, :pushEnabled, SYSDATE)
db:update.db:input-parameters: #[{ customerId: attributes.uriParams.customerId, billReminders: payload.billReminders, outageAlerts: payload.outageAlerts, usageAlerts: payload.usageAlerts, savingsTips: payload.savingsTips, emailEnabled: payload.channels contains "email", smsEnabled: payload.channels contains "sms", pushEnabled: payload.channels contains "push" }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { message: "Preferences updated successfully", customerId: attributes.uriParams.customerId }
